entries.source: "Opportunity cost"
entries.value: "Izindleko zethuba"

entries.source: "Should a company enter this market?"
entries.value: "Ingabe inkampani kufanele ingene kule makethe?"

entries.source: "What makes an argument valid?"
entries.value: "Yini eyenza impikiswano ivumeleke?"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Socratic Instruction on inspir for foundations learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Umhlahlandlela osebenzayo wokusebenzisa i-Socratic Instruction ku-inspir ukuze kufundwe izisekelo, unemiyalo, imijikelezo yokufunda, nemikhuba ye-AI ephephile.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Umjikelezo wokufunda oqinile

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: uthisha we-AI

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Cela isinyathelo sokuqala esincane kunempendulo yokugcina.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Cela i-AI ihlole ukucabanga kwakho, hhayi umphumela kuphela.

entries.source: Build a hypothesis.
entries.value: Yakha umbono wokuhlola.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Qeda ngokubhala umqondo futhi usuka enkumbulweni.

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: Izisekelo

entries.source: Learners who want to think through a topic, test assumptions, and build durable understanding.
entries.value: Abafundi abafuna ukucabanga ngesihloko, bavivinye imibono, futhi bakhe ukuqonda okuhlala njalo.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Imiyalo ongayizama

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Uthisha we-AI we-Socratic Wokuqonda Okujulile uyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Guqula umqondo, impikiswano, inkinga, umbhalo, noma isinqumo kube uchungechunge lwemibuzo olugxilile. Umngane wakho ulalela impendulo ngayinye, amephu izizathu ezicatshangiwe nezikhala, futhi akuphushele esifinyezweni sakho sokugcina. Zama: "Ngisize ngiqonde izindleko zethuba."

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding: practical guide
entries.value: Uthisha we-AI we-Socratic Wokuqonda Okujulile: umhlahlandlela osebenzayo

entries.source: Socratic Instruction
entries.value: Ukufundisa nge-Socratic

entries.source: Start the live mode at Socratic Instruction. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Collaborative Instruction. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Qala imodi ebukhoma ku-Socratic Instruction. Uma ufuna ifomethi yokufunda eseduze, zama i-Collaborative Instruction. Ukuze ubone inkundla kabanzi, funda ukuthi umlingani wokufunda nge-AI kufanele enzele wonke umuntu ini.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tshela imodi ukuthi uzama ukufunda noma ukukhiqiza ini.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Lowo mehluko ubonakala ekugelezeni. Esikhundleni sempendulo eyodwa enkulu, amasession angcono adlula emjikelezweni: setha inhloso, zama okuthile, thola impendulo, lungisa indawo ebuthakathaka, bese ukhetha isenzo esilandelayo.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Lokho kugxila kubalulekile. I-chatbot evamile ingaphendula cishe noma yini, kodwa imodi yokufunda inikeza ingxoxo isimo. Ikusunduza ohlotsheni lokucabanga, ukuzijwayeza, impendulo, noma ukuhlola okusiza umqondo ubambelele.

entries.source: The tutor asks one question at a time, waits for your reasoning, and synthesizes only after you have tried.
entries.value: Umfundisi ubuza umbuzo owodwa ngesikhathi, alinde ukucabanga kwakho, futhi ahlanganise konke kuphela ngemva kokuba uzamile.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Lona umkhuba ofanayo ongemuva kokutadisha nge-AI ngaphandle kokuzikhohlisa: gcina umfundi esebenza. I-AI iwusizo kakhulu lapho ikunikeza impendulo ngokucabanga kwakho.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Le modi iwusizo ikakhulukazi kubafundi abafuna uku:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Zama isinyathelo ngamazwi akho.

entries.source: Turn confusion into a clearer model.
entries.value: Guqula ukudideka kube imodeli ecace kakhudlwana.

entries.source: Use hints before answers.
entries.value: Sebenzisa izeluleko ngaphambi kwezimpendulo.

entries.source: Use Socratic Instruction when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Socratic Instruction uma ufuna iseshini eqala ngokushesha kodwa esakwazi ukuzivumelanisa nawe. Inhloso yokuqala akukhona ukuzwakala uhlakaniphile. Inhloso yokuqala ukwenza isinyathelo esilandelayo sizwakale singenzeka.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Lokho le modi esiza ngakho

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Lapho ongaya khona ngokulandelayo

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Ungaqala futhi ngenguqulo engahlelwanga yenkinga yakho yangempela. Umyalo wokuqala ongacocekile ulungile. Iseshini ingacacisa izinga, izethameli, umnqamulajuqu, nesitayela uma usuqalile.
